key_factors: PE diluted 22.76x near top of 1y range (14.6-23.2x) — valuation stretched vs own history
Debt/equity 10.37x with $64.61B debt vs $6.23B equity — significant balance sheet risk
Strong fundamentals: 28% operating margin, 23.8% net margin, 107.8% ROE support quality
Price flat over 3m (-1.4%) after +18% 1y run — momentum fading at highs
News mixed: 'Diversified Portfolio To Drive Long-Term Growth' offset by 'Uncertainties Loom' analyst note

sources_cited.excerpt: Amgen's Diversified Portfolio To Drive Long-Term Growth, Though Uncertainties Loom

JPM.rationale: Strong franchise fundamentals (15% ROE, 31% net margin) support continued ownership, but P/E at 12.3x is at the top of its 1-year range after a 55% rally, capping risk-adjusted upside.
key_factors: P/E 12.34x sits at the top of 1-year range (7.9-12.3x) — valuation stretched after rally
Strong fundamentals: ROE 15.1%, net margin 31.3%, operating margin 39%
Stock up +55.1% over 1y and +17.6% over 3m — momentum extended, easy money captured
Q4 2023 EPS dipped to 3.05 vs 4.75 in Q2 — some earnings softness into year-end
News tone positive but mixed with defensive themes (credit card debt, safer bank picks)
